item.title: Epigral Ltd’s Mixed Week: -0.09% Price Change Amid Valuation Shifts and Financial Strains
item.description: Epigral Ltd’s stock closed the week nearly flat, declining marginally by 0.09% to Rs.1,327.55, while the Sensex advanced 1.25% over the same period. The week was marked by a strong intraday rally on 4 May, mixed quarterly results revealing margin pressures, and a valuation upgrade signalling renewed price attractiveness amid sector challenges. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Cartrade Tech Ltd Surges 18.14% in a Week: Key Drivers Behind the Rally
item.description: Cartrade Tech Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, surging 18.14% from Rs.1,653.40 on 4 May to Rs.1,953.40 on 8 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex’s 1.25% gain over the same period. The stock’s rally was marked by notable intraday highs, robust trading volumes, and positive quarterly results amid mixed technical signals and a cautious market outlook. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Nuvoco Vistas Gains 13.50%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Momentum
item.description: Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 13.50% from Rs.290.35 on 4 May to Rs.329.55 on 8 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex’s 1.25% gain over the same period. The stock’s rally was marked by notable intraday highs and shifts in technical momentum amid mixed market signals, reflecting a complex but cautiously optimistic trading environment. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Aptus Value Housing Finance Gains 8.19%: Institutional Interest and Valuation Shift Drive Momentum
item.description: Aptus Value Housing Finance India Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 8.19% from Rs.261.40 on 4 May to Rs.282.80 on 8 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex’s 1.25% gain over the same period. The stock’s rally was supported by robust trading volumes, institutional interest, and a notable upgrade in its valuation outlook, despite some cautionary signals from its premium valuation metrics. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Acutaas Chemicals Gains 2.17%: 6 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Momentum
item.description: Acutaas Chemicals Ltd closed the week at Rs.2,733.15, marking a 2.17% gain from its opening price of Rs.2,675.10 on 4 May 2026. This performance outpaced the Sensex’s 1.25% rise over the same period, reflecting the stock’s sustained strength amid mixed market conditions. The week was highlighted by multiple new 52-week and all-time highs, underpinned by robust financial results and strong technical momentum. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Vijaya Diagnostic Centre Ltd Gains 10.81%: 8 Key Factors Driving the Rally
item.description: Vijaya Diagnostic Centre Ltd delivered a robust weekly gain of 10.81%, significantly outperforming the Sensex’s 1.25% rise from 4 to 8 May 2026. The stock consistently hit new 52-week highs throughout the week, culminating in a strong close at Rs.1,278.15 on 8 May, supported by positive technical momentum, sectoral tailwinds, and a recent rating upgrade by MarketsMOJO. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Paras Defence Surges 10.55%: Key Technical Shifts and Market Outperformance
item.description: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 10.55% from ₹783.75 on 4 May to ₹866.45 on 8 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex’s 1.25% gain over the same period. The week was marked by a series of technical developments, including a Golden Cross formation, a Mojo Grade upgrade to Hold, and a notable intraday surge of 7.1%, reflecting renewed investor interest amid mixed but improving momentum signals. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Getalong Enterprise Ltd Falls 1.06%: 4 Key Events Mark a Challenging Week
item.description: Getalong Enterprise Ltd’s stock closed the week at Rs.4.68, down 1.06% from Rs.4.73 at the start of the week, underperforming the Sensex which gained 1.25% over the same period. The week was marked by significant volatility, including a sharp drop to a 52-week and all-time low of Rs.4.26 on 7 May, followed by a partial recovery on the final trading day. Despite broader market strength, the stock’s persistent downtrend reflects ongoing fundamental and technical challenges. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC Ltd Gains 3.32%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Week
item.description: Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC Ltd delivered a solid weekly gain of 3.32%, outperforming the Sensex’s 1.25% rise from 4 to 8 May 2026. The stock showed consistent strength through the week, reaching new 52-week and all-time highs before closing at Rs.1,073.40 on Friday. This performance was supported by a series of positive technical momentum shifts, robust trading volumes, and favourable market conditions within the capital markets sector. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd Gains 3.10%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week
item.description: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd recorded a 3.10% gain over the week ending 8 May 2026, outperforming the Sensex’s 1.25% rise. The stock showed resilience amid mixed technical signals and a notable downgrade to a Hold rating by MarketsMOJO. Key developments included a reassessment of valuation and technical momentum shifts that influenced investor sentiment throughout the week. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: PB Fintech Ltd Declines 1.60% Despite Surge in Derivatives Activity and Technical Upgrade
item.description: PB Fintech Ltd closed the week ending 8 May 2026 at Rs.1,643.75, down 1.60% from Rs.1,670.50 at the start of the week, underperforming the Sensex which gained 1.25% over the same period. The week was marked by significant volatility, with sharp surges in derivatives open interest and trading volumes contrasting with mixed price action and a recent upgrade in the company’s Mojo Grade from Sell to Hold. This review analyses the key events shaping PB Fintech’s performance and outlook during the week. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Sigachi Industries Gains 8.80%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Rally
item.description: Sigachi Industries Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 8.80% from ₹20.23 on 4 May to ₹22.01 on 8 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex’s 1.25% gain over the same period. The stock’s rally was marked by a notable shift in technical momentum, valuation improvements, and two consecutive upper circuit hits amid robust buying interest, despite lingering financial and operational challenges. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: S J S Enterprises Ltd Gains 7.38%: 6 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Momentum
item.description: S J S Enterprises Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, gaining 7.38% from Rs.1,871.45 on 4 May to Rs.2,009.55 on 8 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex’s 1.25% rise over the same period. The stock’s momentum was fuelled by a series of bullish technical signals, new 52-week and all-time highs, and robust quarterly results, underscoring its growing strength within the Auto Components & Equipments sector. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: One 97 Communications Ltd Gains 6.50%: 6 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Momentum
item.description: One 97 Communications Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 6.50% from Rs.1,114.75 on 4 May to Rs.1,187.20 on 8 May 2026, significantly outpacing the Sensex’s 1.25% gain over the same period. The stock’s trajectory was marked by a notable gap up and intraday highs on 7 May, robust trading volumes, and active options market activity, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish momentum and cautious investor positioning amid mixed technical signals and a recent downgrade to a Sell rating. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Latent View Analytics Gains 7.55%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Move
item.description: Latent View Analytics Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 7.55% from Rs.292.90 on 4 May to Rs.315.00 on 8 May, significantly outperforming the Sensex’s 1.25% gain over the same period. This rally was supported by a shift to fair valuation metrics and a mixed but improving technical momentum, reflecting cautious optimism amid persistent sector challenges. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Go Fashion Gains 5.78%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Mixed Momentum
item.description: Go Fashion (India) Ltd closed the week ending 8 May 2026 with a 5.78% gain, outperforming the Sensex’s 1.25% rise. Despite a challenging start marked by financial struggles and technical weakness, the stock showed resilience midweek, supported by mixed technical signals and a modest recovery in price momentum. This review analyses the key events shaping the stock’s performance and the implications for investors navigating a complex market environment. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Tega Industries Ltd’s Mixed Week: +0.19% Price, +1.25% Sensex Tell the Story
item.description: Tega Industries Ltd closed the week ending 8 May 2026 with a marginal gain of 0.19%, rising slightly from ₹1,659.30 to ₹1,662.40. This performance lagged the broader Sensex, which advanced 1.25% over the same period, reflecting a week of mixed technical signals and cautious investor sentiment amid volatile market conditions. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Supriya Lifescience Gains 2.25%: Technical Shift and Hold Upgrade Highlight Week
item.description: Supriya Lifescience Ltd recorded a 2.25% gain over the week ending 8 May 2026, outperforming the Sensex’s 1.25% rise. The stock demonstrated a notable technical momentum shift from a mildly bearish to a sideways trend, accompanied by a MarketsMOJO upgrade to a Hold rating. Despite mixed signals from technical indicators and flat recent financial results, the stock’s relative resilience and stabilising outlook marked a cautiously optimistic week for investors. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Gateway Distriparks Gains 1.08%: Mixed Quarterly Results Shape Weekly Performance
item.description: Gateway Distriparks Ltd closed the week ending 8 May 2026 with a modest gain of 1.08%, rising from Rs.59.34 to Rs.59.98. This performance slightly lagged the broader Sensex, which advanced 1.25% over the same period. The week was marked by mixed financial results and operational challenges, reflected in the stock’s subdued price action despite a strong start midweek. Investors navigated a landscape shaped by quarterly earnings that revealed margin pressures and a shift in financial momentum, alongside steady market conditions. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: GMR Power & Urban Infra Ltd Gains 0.46%: Technical Stabilisation Amid Fundamental Challenges
item.description: GMR Power & Urban Infra Ltd closed the week at Rs.108.25, marking a modest gain of 0.46% from Rs.107.75 at the start of the week, while the Sensex outperformed with a 1.25% rise. The stock exhibited a mixed technical picture, shifting from a mildly bearish to a sideways trend, supported by cautious optimism despite persistent fundamental headwinds including high leverage and flat profitability. Time: 9 minutes ago
